title: crotalaria retusa
intro: Crotalaria retusa, also known as the 'Pang Da Hai', is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In traditional Chinese medicine, Crotalaria retusa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
